query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_hitting_drills,
  SUM(CASE WHEN goal IS NOT NULL AND goal != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_goals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_descriptions
FROM drillDetails
WHERE skillSet = 'Hitting';
